content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

August 5, 1991

Ms. Shirley Huston  
Apartment Rental Owners  
Political Action Committee  
545 No. Mountain Ave., Suite 211  
Upland, CA 91786

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. A-91-337

Dear Ms. Huston:

You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to you concerning the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act. (Government Code Sections 81000-91015.)

Your letter correctly summarizes my advice. The Political Reform Act does not prohibit a general purpose committee from making contributions to both ballot measures and candidates. The committee should use Form 420—Recipient Committee Campaign Statement to disclose contributions received and expenditures made by the committee.

A copy of your letter is enclosed for your convenience.

If you have additional questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Sandra L. Taylor  
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosure
